name: KORU Medical Systems, Inc.
summary: OUR BUSINESS KORU Medical develops, manufactures and commercializes innovative and patient-centric large volume subcutaneous infusion solutions primarily for the subcutaneous drug delivery market as governed by the United States Food and Drug Administration (the FDA) quality and regulatory system and international standards for quality system management.
